name: TAPD
description: 管理需求、缺陷、任务和迭代。查询项目进度、拆分需求、流转状态、填写工时，覆盖研发全生命周期。
description_zh: 管理需求、缺陷、任务和迭代。查询项目进度、拆分需求、流转状态、填写工时，覆盖需求到发布的研发全生命周期。
description_en: Manage stories, bugs, tasks, and iterations. Track progress, break down requirements, update statuses, and log timesheets across the full R&D lifecycle.
examples_zh: 查看我的待办需求和缺陷
获取需求【客户反馈】的内容，拆分成子需求并分配处理人
将迭代【v1.0.0 迭代】内未完成的需求移动到下一个迭代
流转缺陷【缺陷1】状态到「已解决」，并添加评论说明修复方案
将需求【客户反馈】流转到完成状态，并填写 2 个工时
examples_en: Show my pending stories and bugs
Get the content of story 'Customer Feedback', break it down into sub-stories and assign owners
Move unfinished stories in iteration 'v1.0.0' to the next iteration
Change bug 'Bug 1' status to 'Resolved' and add a comment explaining the fix
Mark story 'Customer Feedback' as done and log 2 hours of work
